commands.repair_reason: Draft maintainer PR with a protected label and P2 review findings should stay in maintainer branch review rather than cleanup close or automated repair.; Needs attention: The diff has no dependency or CI supply-chain change, but the new persisted ledger needs a byte budget to avoid local resource-exhaustion risk.; Review finding: [P2] Mark replay incomplete when ledger writes fail — src/acp/translator.ts:1502-1503 -... (sha=bc4b24b403de81c14f392322290dc0434413cf3f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ACP event ledger with file-backed persistence, uses it to replay bridge-created sessions in `loadSession`, and updates ACP tests, docs, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: after `startSession` persists a complete session, a failed prompt/update ledger write can leave later replay marked complete with missing events. A large recorded `rawOutput` also demonstrates that count-only caps do not bound the serialized ledger file.
commands.review_followup: Draft maintainer PR with a protected label and P2 review findings should stay in maintainer branch review rather than cleanup close or automated repair.

target.title: Add ACP session load event ledger
target.author: amknight
